cdc_artifacts.title: ChromeDriver cdc_ artifacts
cdc_artifacts.explanation: cdc_ properties are injected by ChromeDriver (Selenium).

selenium_attributes.title: Selenium DOM attributes
selenium_attributes.explanation: Selenium leaves __webdriver/__selenium attributes on the document.

navigator_webdriver.title: navigator.webdriver
navigator_webdriver.explanation: Set to true by WebDriver-controlled browsers.

node_globals.title: Node globals in the browser
node_globals.explanation: Buffer/process/require present — Node context leaking into the page.

cdp_runtime_enable.title: CDP Runtime.enable leak
cdp_runtime_enable.explanation: A console-getter fired, revealing a Chrome DevTools Protocol client (Puppeteer/Playwright/Selenium).

anti_tamper_patched.title: Patched navigator getter
anti_tamper_patched.explanation: A navigator property getter is not native code — an anti-detect patch.

chrome_runtime_missing.title: window.chrome.runtime missing
chrome_runtime_missing.explanation: UA claims Chrome but chrome.runtime is absent.

permissions_contradiction.title: Permissions/Notification contradiction
permissions_contradiction.explanation: Permissions API state is impossible vs. Notification.permission (classic headless tell).

no_plugins.title: No plugins/mimeTypes
no_plugins.explanation: plugins.length and mimeTypes.length are 0 on a desktop Chrome UA.

canvas_blocked.title: Canvas blocked/zeroed
canvas_blocked.explanation: Canvas readback is blocked or zeroed.

missing_client_hints.title: Missing Sec-CH-UA on Chromium UA
missing_client_hints.explanation: UA claims Chromium but no Sec-CH-UA header.

missing_sec_fetch.title: Missing Sec-Fetch-* on Chromium UA
missing_sec_fetch.explanation: Chromium sends Sec-Fetch-* on navigations; absent here.

minimal_accept.title: Minimal Accept/Accept-Encoding
minimal_accept.explanation: Accept/Accept-Encoding look like an HTTP library default, not a browser.

ip_datacenter.title: IP is datacenter-owned
ip_datacenter.explanation: Datacenter/cloud ASN. A contributor, not proof (VPNs, cloud shells).

scroll_teleport.title: scrollIntoView teleport
scroll_teleport.explanation: Reached the link via a gesture-less, pixel-aligned scroll jump (scrollIntoView/scrollTo).

click_no_trail.title: Click with no approach trail
click_no_trail.explanation: A click with no preceding pointer movement and/or at the exact element center — injected input.

behavior_scripted.title: Scripted form fill
behavior_scripted.explanation: Sub-human fill time, zero-variance typing, or values set with no keystrokes.

tls_ua_vendor_mismatch.title: TLS fingerprint vs User-Agent
tls_ua_vendor_mismatch.explanation: The TLS ClientHello matches a scripting stack (curl/Go/Python) but the UA claims a browser. A real browser cannot emit that ClientHello.

header_order_is_library.title: Header order matches an HTTP library
header_order_is_library.explanation: The request header order matches curl/requests/Go rather than any browser.

cross_nav_inconsistency.title: Fingerprint changed between pages
cross_nav_inconsistency.explanation: JA4/UA/IP changed across the funnel's navigations — a multi-tool pipeline.

funnel_bypass.title: Funnel bypass / deep-link
funnel_bypass.explanation: Reached a later step out of order or without a real click on the previous page.

clean_env_agentic_behavior.title: Clean environment, non-human input
clean_env_agentic_behavior.explanation: A pristine real-browser environment combined with teleporting/trail-less input or teleport scroll — an agent driving a real browser.

permissions_contradiction.title: Permissions contradiction
permissions_contradiction.explanation: Permissions API state impossible vs. Notification.permission.
